overall.description: Nighttime driving through a rain-soaked futuristic coastal road in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle navigates winding asphalt lined with palm trees and rocky cliffs, passing sparse traffic while approaching a neon-lit city skyline with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal road with rocky cliffside

events.description: green sports car overtakes on the right side and pulls ahead

agents.ego_description: driving along the wet winding road, navigating gentle curves through the coastal route

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking the ego vehicle on the right side

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation lining the right side of the road with layered sedimentary texture
tall palm trees with green fronds swaying in the wind along the left roadside
futuristic horizontal LED street lamps with bright white illumination mounted on curved poles
well-maintained green hedge rows running parallel to the yellow curb

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-slicked coastal road at night, bordered by a massive rocky cliff face on the right and palm trees on the left. Futuristic LED streetlights illuminate the wet asphalt as a green sports car overtakes on the right and pulls ahead into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside industrial depot with garage entrance

events.description: passing a parked yellow utility truck and red vehicle on the right shoulder near a garage entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road past a truck depot area with parked industrial vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow utility truck parked on the roadside shoulder
red vehicle parked behind the yellow truck near the garage

entered.detail: industrial building entrance with illuminated interior and yellow signage above the doorway

segments.scene_description: The road curves left past a small industrial depot where a yellow utility truck and red vehicle are parked on the right shoulder. The rocky cliff face continues alongside while the vehicle passes a garage entrance with glowing interior lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to downtown with distant skyline

events.description: city skyline becomes more prominent as the road straightens and opens up

agents.ego_description: driving toward the illuminated city skyline visible on the horizon

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the distance
tall red and white transmission tower rising above the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The road opens into a wide straightaway lined with palm trees on both sides, offering a clear view of the distant city skyline. The rocky cliffs recede into the background as the vehicle approaches the urban center, with a prominent communication tower visible against the night sky.

events.description: passing a large green holographic billboard on the left, increasing neon illumination from building advertisements
entering dense urban area with tall glass buildings closing in on both sides of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit urban canyon toward the city center with increasing building density

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic advertisement display projecting floating imagery
tall modern buildings with illuminated glass facades and neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the urban core where the road becomes a neon-lit canyon lined with glass skyscrapers. A large green holographic billboard glows on the left as the city skyline transforms from a distant view to towering structures surrounding the road, with the rocky cliffs now visible only as a distant backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked coastal road that gradually transforms from a rugged cliffside path into a neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins on wet asphalt bordered by a massive rocky cliff and palm trees, where a green sports car accelerates past the vehicle and disappears into the distance. As the road curves left, the camera passes a small industrial depot with parked utility vehicles and a glowing garage entrance before the terrain opens into a wide straightaway. The rocky cliffs then recede into the background as the vehicle accelerates toward a distant city skyline and a prominent communication tower. Finally, the scene shifts into the urban core, where the open road is replaced by towering glass skyscrapers and a large green holographic billboard that illuminates the surrounding city.
